title: Ayra TRQP Authorization Response
description: Authorization response schema conforming to the Ayra TRQP Profile v0.5.0-draft. Uses the flat response shape from the Ayra Implementers Guide rather than the wrapped decision object in the core CTS schema. See: https://ayraforum.github.io/ayra-trust-registry-resources/guides/

entity_id.description: The entity being tested. MUST be a did:webvh DID in Ayra deployments.

authority_id.description: The ecosystem DID governing this authorization. MUST be a did:webvh DID.

resource.description: The resource the action applies to (e.g. 'credential:driverlicense').

authorized.description: Authorization decision. true = authorized, false = not authorized.

time_evaluated.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the authorization decision was evaluated.

time_requested.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp from the request context, if provided.

$comment: Ayra uses a flat response shape. The core CTS schema wraps the decision in a 'decision' object. This override is applied via profiles/ayra_baseline.yaml schema_overrides. Both schemas validate the same semantic content but with different field structure.
